ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING , REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Sep-01-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Kevin Urbatsch appeared by zoom for and with Debra Dolch by zoom.

The Court noted that the time sheets show $6,900.00 in Trustee's fees, but they are requesting $8,200.00 and raised the issue of the increase in the monthly allowance from $500.00 to $700.00. Mr. Urbatsch stated that the time sheets he's reviewing show $8,050.00 in fees and $551.00 in costs, that it is in the original petition exhibit c-1, that this case was established over 10-years ago and that at that time the Court allowed a $500.00 monthly allowance with no requirement to obtain receipts. Mr. Urbatsch also spoke of Anthony's medical condition, the level of care he requires and the level of care Anthony's Mother provides, and stated that there has been no increase in the amount the Mother receives in over 15-years and requested that the Court allow the increase. The Court stated that it is comfortable with a $600.00 monthly allowance, informed Mr. Urbatsch that it will be making a reduction of $150.00 in fees for one specific hearing that was continued and stated that it is prepared to approve the accounting. The Ninth Account and Report of Trustee, etc. is under submission.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Probate Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Deputy: K. Cabasares. Not reported.

Mr. Urbatsch stated that the outstanding issue is the Trustee's fees, and that he is hoping to get the accounting approved and deal with the Trustee's fees in the ninth account. The Court suggested filing an amendment requesting the exact dollar amount of fees. The Eighth Account and Report of Trustee, etc. is continued to December 3, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #4, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Mar-22-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Kevin Urbatsch for and with Debra Dolch.

The Court stated that the issue with regard to fees on account were not being granted at this time as they were not included in the caption of the petition and that Counsel could file an Ex Parte Petition with notice to all of the entities. Mr. Urbatsch stated that he was willing to withdraw the fee request at this time. The Court stated that it would grant the $500.00 monthly payments and that the manner in which the Mother was documenting the expenses was okay. Mr. Urbatsch and Ms. Dolch addressed the 5 year CD with regard to the interest. The Court granted the petition (subject to review of the order).

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Clauzel.

FUTURE ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Feb-08-2010 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #3, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Apr-20-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Kevin Urbatsch for Debra Dolch (Petitioner).

The Court referred to Article 5 section 2 of the Trust document and stated that it was satisfied that the distributions were made for the purpose of providing Anthony with an enjoyable and comfortable standard of living. The Court granted the petition, (signing the order for the same in open court).

Appearances:Judge: David L. Ballati. Reporter: Susan Lee, CSR#4280. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Harris.
